message:
bd-313x: Add typography + spacing patterns module

Create typography.rs with consistent visual patterns for demo_showcase:
- section_header() / scene_header() for styled titles with rules
- hint(), spacer(), spacer_n() for text and spacing helpers
- divider(), print_divider() for thin visual separators
- status_badge(), status_text() for status indicators
- brand_accent(), muted() for markup helpers
- SECTION_SPACING, PANEL_PADDING, BLOCK_MARGIN constants

These ensure all scenes have a cohesive, designed feel.

Co-Authored-By: Claude Opus 4.5 <noreply@anthropic.com>
